title: xCart — Cart Invalidated After Order Creation

operations.label: setup_prod
operations.query: query { products(storeId: "B2B-store" currencyCode: "USD" first: 1 filter: "category.subtree:fc596540864a41bf8ab78734ee7353a3 price.USD:(0 TO) inStock_variations:true") { items { id } } }

operations.label: add_item
operations.query: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "B2B-store" userId: "user-acme-store-maintainer-1" productId: "be4ab6701f84440ea84ccd09210cbe0a" quantity: 1 }) { id } }

operations.label: set_shipment
set_payment
operations.query: mutation { addOrUpdateCartPayment(command: { storeId: "B2B-store" userId: "user-acme-store-maintainer-1" payment: { paymentGatewayCode: "DefaultManualPaymentMethod" } }) { id } }

operations.label: add_after_convert

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] add_after_convert: data.addItem.status should reflect converted/processed state OR errors[] non-empty. The cart must NOT accept new items. NO HTTP 500.
crossLayerChecks.note: add_after_convert: data.addItem.status should reflect converted/processed state OR errors[] non-empty. The cart must NOT accept new items. NO HTTP 500.
crossLayerChecks.resolved: add_after_convert: data.addItem.status should reflect converted/processed state OR errors[] non-empty. The cart must NOT accept new items. NO HTTP 500.
